description: volume_search — digitized Schuylkill County, Pennsylvania probate image groups, all browse-only (recordSearchablePercent 0, fulltextSearchable false). Drives the multi-FILM-SPAN selection case (ut_search_images_011): TWO of the three volumes are BOTH correct on place AND record type AND era — the Schuylkill probate run is split across two films whose date ranges partition the period (007936749 = 1851-1890, 007936752 = 1891-1930). A probate filed in the late-1880s-to-1890s window straddles the film boundary, so BOTH Schuylkill films jointly cover the target and both must be browsed; picking only one risks missing the will. The third volume (005440021) is Berks County probate — right type, wrong county — a scoping decoy that must NOT be browsed. Contrast with volume-search-schuylkill-multi-browse (single correct winner among wrong-place/wrong-type traps); this fixture exercises the case the reviewer raised where several candidates are ALL matching. The predicate matches any standardPlace containing 'Schuylkill'; the test loads exactly one volume_search fixture.
